12. ! [X0] : (binge_watches(karen,X0) | (~popular(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0))) [ennf transformation 2]
13. ! [X0] : (binge_watches(karen,X0) | ~popular(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0)) [flattening 12]
14. ! [X0] : ((binge_watches(karen,X0) | ~downloads(karen,X0)) & (downloads(karen,X0) | ~binge_watches(karen,X0))) [nnf transformation 3]

29. downloads(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0) [resolution 17,18]
30. ~netflix_show(black_mirror) | ~popular(black_mirror) [resolution 29,20]
